title: New UCC Canned Coffee design and figures
display_title: New UCC Canned Coffee design and figures
wikitext:
[]: New UCC Canned Coffee design and figures [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 08, 2010 4:09 pm Seems that these are meant to commemorate the release of 2.22 on DVD/Blu-Ray and will be out April 27th. Personally I find it hilarious Asuka's "slut-suit" is going to be on one of the can covers considering how much people find it groan-worthy save for the fanservice. The figures themselves seem pretty nice at least.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Apr 08, 2010 6:33 pm I agree.The figures are pretty nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Apr 08, 2010 9:51 pm Thanks for posting these Sailor Star Dust. LOL. Yes i agree. These figures do look nice. But yeah....i mean what a blatant fit of advertising for UCC lol. But it would be pretty cool to have i guess. Too bad they arent larger than 5-6 inches though....

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 09, 2010 10:01 pm For anybody who cares: News posted, whee~

[]:             Quote Post by Jesterhead » Fri Apr 09, 2010 10:15 pm I'm kinda glad the figures aren't to elaborate and big. If I'm spending a lot of money on an Eva girl figure, I'd rather her not holding a can of coffee.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:23 am "Slut-suit"?

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Sat Apr 10, 2010 12:34 am DIDDY wrote: "Slut-suit"?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 10, 2010 1:02 am That's the joke/reference, yes. Personally I don't mind the test-suit too much, though I can't help but find the concept of the design itself to be groan-worthy.

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Sat Apr 10, 2010 10:53 am IDontWantNoScrub wrote: The test plugsuit. I guess some fans find it too...revealing? Personally I don't mind one way or the other.

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Sat Apr 10, 2010 11:36 am KaaVI wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:22 pm I've already got a lead on aquiring a set of those beauties. I still kick myself for missing the original set but so far I've been able to get all the rebuild cans.

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Thu Apr 15, 2010 9:25 am one thing that baffles me is, how exactly will they refrigerate these things without potentially destroying the figures or the packaging?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Apr 15, 2010 9:39 am KaaVI wrote: one thing that baffles me is, how exactly will they refrigerate these things without potentially destroying the figures or the packaging?

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Apr 15, 2010 12:34 pm KaaVI wrote: one thing that baffles me is, how exactly will they refrigerate these things without potentially destroying the figures or the packaging?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sat Apr 24, 2010 12:58 am KaaVI wrote: one thing that baffles me is, how exactly will they refrigerate these things without potentially destroying the figures or the packaging?

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sat Apr 24, 2010 8:51 pm I don't really drink coffee, so I'd like a can just to collect it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Sat Apr 24, 2010 10:48 pm I'd totally buy them for the figures for sure, but I probably wouldn't even drink the stuff.

[]: Where can I buy ?             Quote Post by Ikkichi » Thu Dec 08, 2011 2:17 pm Does any one know where I can buy these online :(

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 08, 2011 2:28 pm J List. I'd link to the site but it has tons of NSFW stuff too.

[]:             Quote Post by Xacebans » Sat Dec 10, 2011 2:23 pm I want me some Eva coffee, though I bet the stuff itself is gross; I'd buy it for the figure and can.

Personally I find it hilarious Asuka's "slut-suit" is going to be on one of the can covers considering how much people find it groan-worthy save for the fanservice. The figures themselves seem pretty
